message.content:
You are working on the recommendations-service NestJS repo at /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service.

Follow this COMPLETE workflow for Jira task RECO-678:

## Step 1: Get ATLASSIAN_CLOUD_ID
```bash
grep ATLASSIAN_CLOUD_ID .env | cut -d'=' -f2
```
Use getJiraIssue MCP tool with that cloud ID and key "RECO-678" to understand which files/rules to fix.

## Step 2: Create branch from current branch (NOT main)
```bash
git checkout -b RECO-678-<kebab-case-summary>
```

## Step 3: Run ESLint on target files to see violations
```bash
npm run lint -- --max-warnings=0 path/to/file.ts
```

## Step 4: Fix ESLint violations
- Run `npm run lint:fix` first for auto-fixes
- Then fix remaining manually
- Most common fix: named object params pattern:
  ```typescript
  // ❌ function myFn(id: string, name: string): void {}
  // ✅ function myFn({ id, name }: { id: string; name: string }): void {}
  ```
- NO COMMENTS in code
- Use path aliases only (no relative imports)
- Explicit return types required

## Step 5: Fix ALL callers of changed functions (CRITICAL)
Use Grep tool to find every call site across src/ and test/. Update every caller to use new object param syntax. Do NOT use rest-spread `{ ...param }` shortcut.

Check: same module controllers/services, other modules importing this service, CLI commands in src/modules/cli/, scripts in src/scripts/, test files.

## Step 6: Fix tests
Update mock calls AND assertions in unit-spec.ts and e2e-spec.ts files to match new signatures.
Run: `npm run test:coverage`
Do NOT stop until all tests pass.

## Step 7: Verify
```bash
npm run lint
npm run type-check
```
Both must pass.

## Step 8: Commit and push
```bash
git add <specific files only, no git add -A>
git commit -m "RECO-678: <imperative mood description>"
git push -u origin <branch-name>
```

## Step 9: Create PR
Use `gh pr create`. Check the PR template at .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md first. 
- Title: "RECO-678: <short description>"
- Target branch: the branch this was cut FROM (check with `git log --oneline -5` to see base)
- Fill the PR template properly

Return the PR URL when done.

content.text: I'll follow the complete workflow for RECO-678. Let me start by getting the Atlassian Cloud ID and understanding the task.

input.description: Check recent commits for base branch context

content.text: The ATLASSIAN_CLOUD_ID isn't in the .env file and the Jira MCP tool isn't available. Let me look at the pattern from the recent commit RECO-688 which fixed similar violations, and search for the relevant files for RECO-678.

input.description: See what files were changed in RECO-688 (similar task)

content.content:
commit 3c978a1d3e27954c541dd637d0847b04edcf22f0
Author: Andrii Popenko <42321105+4thwithme@users.noreply.github.com>
Date:   Tue Mar 17 14:44:38 2026 +0100

    RECO-688: fix require-object-params violations in style-alternatives and styles-mv (#494)
    
    * RECO-695: fix eslint
    
    * RECO-687: enforce require-object-params on formatting utils
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    
    * RECO-659: enforce require-object-params on date-helpers util
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    
    * RECO-660: fix require-object-params ESLint violations in color-match util
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    
    * RECO-689: fix require-object-params for array, check-internal-access, and setup-swagger utils
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    
    * RECO-690: refactor random-color-picker util to use object destructuring params
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    
    * RECO-691: fix require-object-params violations in utils
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    
    * RECO-693: fix require-object-params violations in style-colors module
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    
    * RECO-694: fix require-object-params violations in category-correlations module
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    
    * RECO-694: handle null response in responseFormatter for getTopCorrelatedCategories
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    
    * RECO-686: fix require-object-params violations in request-store util
    
    Refactor deepClone, mergeObjectsDeeply, and requestStore methods to use
    single object destructuring parameter pattern. Update all call sites and
    tests accordingly. Remove stale eslint-disable comments.
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    
    * RECO-688: fix require-object-params violations in style-alternatives and styles-mv
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    
    ---------
    
    Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
